name: Tutti-Fruitti Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the melted shortening and sugar until light.
2. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add the eggs to the creamed mixture and beat until well combined.
4. Alternately add the chopped dates, diced pineapple, nuts, and candied orange peel with the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture. Mix thoroughly.
5. Pour the batter into a shallow, well-oiled pan.
6. Bake in a slow oven (325°F) for about 30 minutes.
7. Allow to cool completely.
8. Cut into squares and dust with powdered sugar.
12 servings.
